title: Receipt scenario
description: Chatman engine acceptance/falsification scenario. The expected_refusal enum mirrors Refusal::name() in crates/praxis-graphlaw/src/chatman/abi.rs exactly; tests/chatman_static_gates.rs asserts set-equality.

kind.description: acceptance: input must be admitted; falsification: input must be refused with expected_refusal.

seed.description: Deterministic seed; same seed => same bytes.

mutation.description: Optional named mutation applied to the acceptance base case to produce this falsification case.

expected_refusal.description: Required for kind=falsification: the Refusal::name() value the engine must return.

expected_behavior.description: Human-readable statement of the admitted behavior (kind=acceptance).

canon_nquads.description: Canonical N-Quads material, one quad per line, lines sorted; the digest is computed over these bytes with BLAKE3.

carried_digest.description: Optional digest a mutated scenario carries; verify() must recompute and refuse on mismatch.

profile_hash_check.description: Optional profile-identity check mirroring ChatmanEngine::admit_transition (engine.rs): the envelope's claimed profile is checked against the engine's routed profile; mismatch refuses with ProfileHashMismatch. When present, this check runs instead of the plain carried_digest comparison.

claimed_profile_id.description: Profile id the invocation envelope names (envelope.profile_id).

engine_profile_id.description: Profile id this engine instance actually runs (router.gates().profile_id).

projection_hash_check.description: Optional Triple8 projection-hash check mirroring ProfileSymbolTable::verify_projection (triple8.rs): triples are resolved against a bounded symbol universe, hashed, and compared against recorded_hash; mismatch refuses with ProjectionHashMismatch. When present, this check runs instead of the plain carried_digest comparison.

snapshot_id.description: Graph snapshot id the projection is scoped to.

triples.description: Triples as [subject, predicate, object]; each term must be a member of universe.

recorded_hash.description: The recorded projection hash to verify against the recomputed one.
